response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant exposure to AI-agent systems and cloud technologies. While his AI-specific experience is not as deep as the role requires, his leadership in developer tooling, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and production-grade system design suggests potential to grow into the Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role with targeted mentorship.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development and technical leadership, including customer-facing roles.
Hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) at re:cinq, aligning with key technologies.
Proven ability to design and deploy production-grade systems on cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
concerns: Limited explicit experience with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures or vector databases.
AI/GenAI experience is not the primary focus of his career, raising questions about depth in LLM optimization and evaluation.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, which is a preferred qualification.
